title: Healthcare Immigration Services — ELLIS PORTER
content:
Physicians | Nurses | Allied Health Professionals | Healthcare Employers

## Immigration Services for Physicians
Ellis Porter provides the following immigration services for Physicians:
- Temporary Work Visas (H-1B, J-1, E-3 and O-1)
Temporary Work Visas (H-1B, J-1, E-3 and O-1)
- J-1 Waivers (Conrad 30, Hardship and Persecution)
J-1 Waivers (Conrad 30, Hardship and Persecution)
- EB-1 Extraordinary Ability and Outstanding Researcher Green Cards
EB-1 Extraordinary Ability and Outstanding Researcher Green Cards
- EB-2 Physician National Interest Waiver (NIW) Green Cards
EB-2 Physician National Interest Waiver (NIW) Green Cards
- EB-2 PERM Labor Certification Based Green Card
EB-2 PERM Labor Certification Based Green Card

## Immigration Services for Nurses
Ellis Porter provides the following immigration services for Nurses:
- TN (NAFTA) Visas for Canadian Nurses and Mexican Nurses
TN (NAFTA) Visas for Canadian Nurses and Mexican Nurses
- H-1B Visas for Advanced Practice Nurses and Nurse Managers
H-1B Visas for Advanced Practice Nurses and Nurse Managers
- Fast-Track “Schedule A” Green Cards
Fast-Track “Schedule A” Green Cards
- EB-2 and EB-3 PERM Labor Certification Based Green Cards
EB-2 and EB-3 PERM Labor Certification Based Green Cards

## Immigration Services for Allied Health Professionals
Ellis Porter provides the following immigration services for Allied Health Professionals:
- Temporary Work Visas (H-1B, TN, E-3 and O-1)
Temporary Work Visas (H-1B, TN, E-3 and O-1)
- Fast-Track Green Cards (also called “Schedule A” Green Cards) for Physical Therapists
Fast-Track Green Cards (also called “Schedule A” Green Cards) for Physical Therapists
- EB-2 and EB-3 PERM Labor Certification Based Green Cards
EB-2 and EB-3 PERM Labor Certification Based Green Cards

## Immigration Services for Healthcare Employers
Ellis Porter provides the following immigration services for Hospitals, Health Systems, Medical Clinics, Federally Qualified Health Clinics (FQHC) and Other Healthcare Employers:
- Work Visa and Green Card Services for Physicians, Nurses and Allied Health Professionals
Work Visa and Green Card Services for Physicians, Nurses and Allied Health Professionals
- Work Visa and Green Card Services for Management, Administrative and IT Professionals
Work Visa and Green Card Services for Management, Administrative and IT Professionals
- Work Visa and Green Card Services for Medical Researchers and Scientists
Work Visa and Green Card Services for Medical Researchers and Scientists
- Immigration Compliance (I-9, LCA, E-Verify)
Immigration Compliance (I-9, LCA, E-Verify)
- Immigration Policy Development
Immigration Policy Development
- Recruitment and Retention Strategies for Foreign National Employees
Recruitment and Retention Strategies for Foreign National Employees
